Name: ValueSetLebensphaseDe
Title: LebensphaseDe ValueSet
Description: Dieses Valueset enthält Snomedcodes zur Angabe der Lebensphase

Name: SNOMEDCTBodyStructures
Title: SNOMED CT Body Structures
Description: This value set includes all codes from [SNOMED CT](http://snomed.info/sct) where concept is-a 442083009 (Anatomical or acquired body site (body structure)).

Name: CarePlanActivityKind
Title: Care Plan Activity Kind
Description: Resource types defined as part of FHIR that can be represented as in-line definitions of a care plan activity.

Name: CarePlanActivityOutcome
Title: Care Plan Activity Outcome
Description: Example codes indicating the outcome of a care plan activity. Note that these are in no way complete and might not even be appropriate for some uses.

Name: CarePlanActivityStatus
Title: CarePlanActivityStatus
Description: Codes that reflect the current state of a care plan activity within its overall life cycle.

Name: CarePlanCategory
Title: Care Plan Category
Description: Example codes indicating the category a care plan falls within.  Note that these are in no way complete and might not even be appropriate for some uses.

Name: CarePlanIntent
Title: Care Plan Intent
Description: Codes indicating the degree of authority/intentionality associated with a care plan.

Name: SNOMEDCTClinicalFindings
Title: SNOMED CT Clinical Findings
Description: This value set includes all the "Clinical finding" [SNOMED CT](http://snomed.info/sct) codes - concepts where concept is-a 404684003 (Clinical finding (finding)).

Name: CommonTags
Title: Common Tags
Description: Common Tag Codes defined by FHIR project

Name: ConditionCategoryCodes
Title: Condition Category Codes
Description: Preferred value set for Condition Categories.

Name: ConditionClinicalStatusCodes

Description: Preferred value set for Condition Clinical Status.

Name: Condition/Problem/DiagnosisCodes

Description: Example value set for Condition/Problem/Diagnosis codes.

Name: ConditionPredecessorCodes

Name: ConditionStage

Description: Example value set for stages of cancer and other conditions.

Name: ConditionStageType
Title: Condition Stage Type
Description: Example value set for the type of stages of cancer and other conditions

Name: ConditionVerificationStatus
Title: ConditionVerificationStatus

Name: DiagnosisRole

Name: EpisodeOfCareStatus

Description: The status of the episode of care.

Name: EpisodeOfCareType
Title: Episode of care type

Name: GoalAchievementStatus
Title: Goal achievement status
Description: Describes the progression, or lack thereof, towards the goal against the target.

Name: GoalPriority
Title: Goal priority
Description: Indicates the level of importance associated with reaching or sustaining a goal.

Name: GoalStartEvent
Title: Goal start event
Description: Identifies types of events that might trigger the start of a goal.

Name: GoalLifecycleStatus
Title: GoalLifecycleStatus
Description: Codes that reflect the current state of a goal and whether the goal is still being targeted.

Name: CommonLanguages
Title: Common Languages
Description: This value set includes common codes from BCP-47 (http://tools.ietf.org/html/bcp47)

Name: ManifestationAndSymptomCodes

Name: SNOMEDCTMedicationCodes

Name: LOINCCodes

Name: ProcedureCodes(SNOMEDCT)

Description: Procedure Code: All SNOMED CT procedure codes.

Name: QuantityComparator

Name: RequestStatus

Name: All Security Labels
